info.name: eKI API v0.5 - Complete Security Analysis
info.description:
KI-gestuetzte Sicherheitspruefung fuer Drehbuecher - Filmakademie Baden-Wuerttemberg

**Features (M01-M05):**
- FDX + PDF Drehbuch-Parsing
- LLM-gestuetzte Risikoanalyse (Ollama/Mistral)
- Risiko-Taxonomie mit 23 Klassen und Scoring
- JSON + PDF Report-Erzeugung
- One-Shot Report-Abholung (Pull) oder Push an ePro
- Idempotenz und Job-Status-Tracking

**Setup:**
1. Start services: docker compose up -d
2. Run migration: docker compose exec api alembic upgrade head
3. Create API Key: docker compose exec api python scripts/create_api_key.py --insert
4. Set API_KEY variable in Postman

variable.description: Create with: docker compose exec api python scripts/create_api_key.py --insert
Second API key (different user_id) for IDOR tests

item.name: 2. PDF Workflow (Async) - Fixture Scripts

request.description:
Regiefassung TRANCE (Vollstaendiges Drehbuch).

**Fixture:** `tests/fixtures/pdf/TRANCE_REGIEFASSUNG_27042025.pdf`
**Tipp:** Falls Datei nicht gefunden wird, Postman Working Directory auf das Projekt-Root setzen:
Settings -> General -> Working Directory -> `/pfad/zu/eKI_API`

Drehbuch Sinkende Schiffe.

**Fixture:** `tests/fixtures/pdf/SINKENDE_SCHIFFE_190730.pdf`

Drehbuch H2Gold v3.7.

**Fixture:** `tests/fixtures/pdf/H2Gold_250406_h2gold_V3.7.pdf`

Drehbuch Babystar (Fuenfte Fassung).

**Fixture:** `tests/fixtures/pdf/Babystar_Drehbuch_Babystar_Fuenfte_Fassung_240414.pdf`

Screenplay Matroshki (deutsch).

**Fixture:** `tests/fixtures/pdf/Matroshki_250515_Matroshki_Screenplay-DE.pdf`

Eigene PDF-Datei per Dateiauswahl hochladen.

**Weitere Fixtures in `tests/fixtures/pdf/`:**
- Fische haben kein Gewissen 5.2 Fassung.pdf
- Gaia_Scipt_French.pdf (franzoesisch)
- ICONIC 220202_ICONIC_PPM-MAPPE_JUNGLE.pdf (Projektmappe)
- Trance_Projektmappe_TRANCE(AT)_F8_25022025.pdf (Projektmappe)
- Sinkende Schiffe_SE_Projektmappe_190717.pdf (Projektmappe)
- h2gold_Treatment_2024.pdf (Treatment)
- KOENIGSKINDER_Buch_F2_Test_211122 (1).pdf
- The_fly_MAPPE_THEFLY_v4_lq.pdf
- If I could Fly 221212 FLY v17_compressed.pdf

Poll until status=completed and report_id is set.

**Repeat** every 10-30 seconds until status is 'completed'.
PDF workflows dauern laenger wegen LLM-Szenenstrukturierung.
**Then:** Fetch the report using the report_id.

ONE-SHOT: Fetches JSON report + PDF (base64).

**WARNING:** This URL is invalidated after the first successful call!
**Response contains:**
- report: Full JSON with findings, risk_summary, measures, scores
- pdf_base64: Base64-encoded PDF report

**Finding fields (M04):**
- risk_class, rule_id, category, likelihood, impact, risk_level
- evidence: Textauszug/Regelbegruendung aus dem Drehbuch
- vulnerability: Verletzlichkeitsfaktoren (Kinder, Tiere, Stunts-Double)
- complexity: Komplexitaetsfaktoren (Extras, Mehrkameras, Wasser/Feuer)
- exposure_duration: Geschaetzte Dauer der Risikoexposition
- measures: Zugeordnete Sicherheitsmassnahmen

**Second call returns:** 410 Gone

Verify One-Shot enforcement.

**Expected:** 410 Gone
**Proves:** Report was deleted after first retrieval.

item.description:
PDF-Workflow mit echten Drehbuechern aus tests/fixtures/pdf/.

Ablauf: Submit PDF -> Poll -> Fetch Report -> Verify One-Shot

**Setup:** Postman Working Directory auf Projekt-Root setzen:
Settings -> General -> Working Directory

**Verfuegbare Fixtures:**
- Regiefassungen: TRANCE
- Drehbuecher: Sinkende Schiffe, H2Gold, Babystar, Matroshki, Fische, Koenigskinder
- Projektmappen: TRANCE, ICONIC, Sinkende Schiffe SE, The Fly
- Treatments: H2Gold Treatment
- Fremdsprachig: Gaia (FR)

item.name: 3. FDX Workflow (Async)

exec: '<Paragraph Type="Scene Heading" Number="1"><Text>EXT. CLIFF EDGE - NIGHT</Text></Paragraph>'+

'<Paragraph Type="Action"><Text>A stunt performer stands at the edge of a 15-meter cliff. Below, dark water churns. Safety divers are positioned in the water. The performer checks the harness one last time, then jumps.</Text></Paragraph>'+
'<Paragraph Type="Dialogue"><Text>Clear the zone! Jump on my mark!</Text></Paragraph>'+

'<Paragraph Type="Action"><Text>Three cars race at high speed along the highway. The lead car swerves, narrowly avoiding a truck. Sparks fly as metal scrapes the guardrail. A massive explosion erupts behind them as a fuel tanker ignites.</Text></Paragraph>'+
'<Paragraph Type="Scene Heading" Number="3"><Text>INT. BURNING BUILDING - NIGHT</Text></Paragraph>'+

'<Paragraph Type="Action"><Text>Flames engulf the hallway. Smoke makes visibility near zero. A firefighter carries an unconscious child through the inferno. The ceiling collapses behind them.</Text></Paragraph>'+

'<Paragraph Type="Action"><Text>Two fighters engage in hand-to-hand combat on the roof of a 20-story building. One performer is thrown near the edge. Weapons are drawn - prop knives and a replica firearm.</Text></Paragraph>'+

request.description:
Submit a 4-scene FDX stunt script (inline Base64/JSON).

Scenes: cliff jump, highway chase with explosion, burning building, rooftop fight.

**Expected:** 202 Accepted with job_id

exec: '<Paragraph Type="Scene Heading" Number="1"><Text>EXT. CLIFF EDGE - NIGHT</Text></Paragraph>'+
'<Paragraph Type="Action"><Text>A stunt performer stands at the edge of a 15-meter cliff. Below, dark water churns. The performer jumps.</Text></Paragraph>'+

request.description:
Submit a script with **push delivery** - the report is POSTed to callback_url when done.

**callback_url** must be HTTPS and on a whitelisted domain:
- epro.filmakademie.de
- epro-stage.filmakademie.de

**Expected:** 202 Accepted with job_id

Poll until status=completed and report_id is set.

**Repeat** every 10-30 seconds until status is 'completed'.

ONE-SHOT: Fetches JSON report + PDF (base64).

**WARNING:** URL is invalidated after first call!

**Finding fields (M04):** evidence, vulnerability, complexity, exposure_duration, measures

**Second call returns:** 410 Gone

item.name: 5. Security Tests

request.description:
**Expected:** 401 Unauthorized

Request without Authorization header.

**Expected:** 401 Unauthorized

Request with invalid/unknown API key.

**Expected:** 422 Validation Error

Invalid base64 in script_content.

**Expected:** 422 Validation Error

SQL injection attempt in project_id (only alphanumeric + hyphens allowed).

**Expected:** 422 Validation Error

Callback URL with private IP blocked (SSRF prevention).

**Expected:** 422 Validation Error

Only whitelisted domains allowed for callback_url (epro.filmakademie.de, epro-stage.filmakademie.de).

**Expected:** 404 Not Found

**Setup:** Requires API_KEY_USER2 variable (different user_id than API_KEY).
Accessing another user's job via a different API key should return 404 (ownership check).

Send twice with same idempotency_key.

**Expected:** Second call returns same job_id (no duplicate workflow created).

item.description:
Security and validation tests.

Run all requests - each should return the expected error code.

item.name: 6. Automated PDF Flow (Run as Collection)

exec: console.error('No job_id in response, aborting flow');

formdata.description: PDF aus tests/fixtures/pdf/ -- vor dem Run einmalig Datei auswaehlen oder Working Directory setzen

request.description:
**Automated Flow Step 1:** Schickt eine PDF aus den Fixtures ab.

**Vor dem ersten Run:**
1. Klicke auf 'Select Files' beim file-Feld
2. Waehle eine PDF aus `tests/fixtures/pdf/`, z.B.:
   - TRANCE_REGIEFASSUNG_27042025.pdf (Regiefassung)
   - SINKENDE_SCHIFFE_190730.pdf (Drehbuch)
   - H2Gold_250406_h2gold_V3.7.pdf (Drehbuch)
   - Babystar_Drehbuch_Babystar_Fuenfte_Fassung_240414.pdf
   - Matroshki_250515_Matroshki_Screenplay-DE.pdf
3. Danach den Ordner per 'Run folder' starten

**Oder:** Postman Working Directory auf Projekt-Root setzen, dann wird der `src`-Pfad automatisch aufgeloest.

exec: console.log('Status: ' + resp.status + ' | Progress: ' + progress + '% | Poll #' + count);
pm.test('Job should complete within 60 polls', function () {
pm.expect.fail('Timeout after ' + count + ' polls. Last status: ' + resp.status);

request.description:
**Automated Flow Step 2:** Polls job status in a loop.

- Waits 5-30s between polls (incremental backoff)
- Loops back to itself until status is `completed`
- On `completed`: saves REPORT_ID and proceeds to Step 3
- On `failed`: stops with error
- Max 60 polls before timeout

exec: pm.test('Findings contain M04 taxonomy fields', function () {
console.log('First finding: ' + f0.risk_class + ' (' + f0.rule_id + ') severity=' + f0.risk_level);

request.description:
**Automated Flow Step 3:** Fetches the completed report.

Validates:
- Report contains findings and risk_summary
- PDF is included as base64
- Logs summary to console

**Note:** This is a one-shot URL -- it is invalidated after this call.

item.description:
Vollautomatischer PDF-Flow fuer den Collection Runner.

**Einmalig vor dem ersten Run:**
1. In 'Step 1' das file-Feld oeffnen und eine PDF aus `tests/fixtures/pdf/` waehlen
   ODER: Postman Working Directory auf Projekt-Root setzen

**Nutzung:**
1. Rechtsklick auf diesen Ordner -> 'Run folder'
2. Im Runner: Delay auf 0ms lassen (Wartezeiten sind eingebaut)
3. 'Run' klicken und zusehen

**Ablauf:**
1. Submit: PDF-Drehbuch hochladen -> 202 mit job_id
2. Poll: Status-Abfrage in Schleife (5-30s Backoff) bis completed
3. Fetch: Report abrufen mit Findings, Risk Summary und PDF

Alle Variablen (JOB_ID, REPORT_ID) werden automatisch gesetzt.
